source_id.description: Stable identifier for the source item being extracted.

source_path.description: Path to the archived source file used as extractor input.

media_type.description: Detected or declared media type for the source file.

extraction_method.description: High-level extraction path used for this source, such as native text extraction, OCR, or manual transcription.

warnings.description: General machine warnings produced during extraction.

layout_warnings.description: Warnings about layout fidelity, reading order, captions, figures, diagrams, tables, or other structure-sensitive extraction issues.

ocr_used.description: Whether OCR was used for any part of the extraction.

language_hint.description: Optional language hint supplied to or detected by the extractor.
